# PLOT

## HP in module
```{r}
HP <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/files/HP_mu.csv")
data <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HP_430_iModulon.csv")

merged_data <- merge(HP, data, by.y = "locus", by.x = "HP2080")
length(unique(merged_data$HP2080))
```

## Compare HP in differnt annotation
```{r}
library(UpSetR)
HP_anno <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HP_anno_final.csv")
x = list(a=HP_anno[HP_anno$GO.term != "#N/A",]$HP.genes,
         b=HP_anno[HP_anno$Virulence.pathway != "#N/A",]$HP.genes,
         b=HP_anno[HP_anno$ICA.perspective.1 != "#N/A",]$HP.genes,
         b=HP_anno[HP_anno$ICA.perspective.2 != "#N/A",]$HP.genes)
ggVennDiagram(x, category.names = c("GO term", "Virulence pathway", "ICA perspective 1", "ICA perspective 2"),
              label = "count") +
                scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#eb6483")
ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HP_anno_venn.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)

ggVennDiagram(x, category.names = c("GO term", "Virulence pathway", "ICA perspective 1", "ICA perspective 2"),
              force_upset = T) 

pdf("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HP_anno_upset.pdf", width = 7, height = 4)
upset(fromList(x),order.by = "freq", 
    keep.order = TRUE)
dev.off()
```
